en: especially in perfect unison. We apologise for the fruity sign language.
Seems like Lasso's really settled into our culture.
ko: 라소가 우리 문화에 정말 잘 적응한 것 같아.

en: He certainly has. Oi, Bannett, here's what's going to happen, yeah?
You're going to foul me, and I'm going to score all the way from back here.
ko: 네가 나를 반칙할 거고, 나는 여기서 골을 넣을 거야.

en: It's off the top. Stay with me! Stay with me!
OK. All right, here we go.
Well, I tell you, mate, what did I tell you? Stay with me!
ko: 내가 말했지, 친구, 내가 뭐라고 했는지 기억나?

en: Oh, glad he's on our team. Hey, what do you think? Trick play?
